allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Name NUL -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \(-not \(Test-Path NUL\)\) { Write-Host "NUL 文件不存在 in filesystem" })
Bash(git -c http.version=HTTP/1.1 -c http.postBuffer=524288000 push origin main)

PowerShell(try { $result = curl.exe -s -o NUL -w "%{http_code}" --connect-timeout 15 https://github.com 2>$null; Write-Host "curl result: $result" } catch { Write-Host "curl failed: $_" }; Write-Host "---"; nslookup github.com 2>$null | Select-String "Address")
